verses.1: A Song of degrees. Blessed is every one that feareth the LORD; that walketh in his ways.
verses.2: For thou shalt eat the labor of thy hands: happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.
verses.3: Thy wife shall be as a fruitful vine by the sides of thy house: thy children like olive plants around thy table.
verses.4: Behold, that thus shall the man be blessed that feareth the LORD.
verses.5: The LORD shall bless thee out of Zion: and thou shalt see the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life.
verses.6: Yes, thou shalt see thy children's children, and peace upon Israel.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
